prompt: what are the current claude model ids and which one should i default to for an agent that mostly does tool calling? i keep seeing different names in blog posts and half of them seem outdated
assertions: Cites a primary Anthropic source (docs.anthropic.com / platform.claude.com / anthropic.com), not only blogs or aggregators
States when each claim was verified or the publication date of sources (recency discipline)
Gives one concrete default recommendation rather than an undifferentiated list
Output includes a Sources section with working references
